debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ range f = Ran (graph f)

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro v
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, graph, Prod.mk.injEq]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  ext y
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop]
  constructor
  · -- Prove the forward direction: if y is in the range of f, then y is in the range of the graph of f.
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine' ⟨x, _⟩
    simp [graph]
    <;> aesop
  · -- Prove the reverse direction: if y is in the range of the graph of f, then y is in the range of f.
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨⟨x, _⟩, rfl⟩
    refine' ⟨x, _⟩
    simp [graph]
    <;> aesop

by
  have h_subset : range f ⊆ Ran (graph f) := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine' ⟨(x, f x), _⟩
    <;> simp [graph]
    <;> aesop
  
  have h_superset : Ran (graph f) ⊆ range f := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨⟨x, z⟩, h1, rfl⟩
    have h2 : z = f x := by
      simp [graph] at h1
      tauto
    have h3 : f x ∈ range f := by
      exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
    have h4 : z ∈ range f := by
      rw [h2] at *
      exact h3
    exact h4
  
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h_subset h_superset

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_image, graph_apply, exists_prop]
  <;>
  tauto
range f

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ran.mem]
  <;>
  constructor <;>
  intro h <;>
  (try { cases h with
    | intro x hx => use (x, f x) <;> simp_all [restrict] <;> aesop }) <;>
  (try { cases h with
    | intro ⟨x, _⟩ hx => use x <;> simp_all [restrict] <;> aesop }) <;>
  aesop

by
  funext y
  simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_Ran]
  <;>
  constructor <;>
  intro h <;>
  (try cases h with
  | intro x hx =>
    refine' ⟨x, _⟩
    <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
    <;> aesop) <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      rcases h with ⟨x, hx⟩
      refine' ⟨x, _⟩
      <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
      <;> aesop
    })

by
  rw [Set.ext_iff]
  intro y
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop]
  <;>
  simp [Set.mem_image, graph]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h : range f = Ran (graph f) := by
    ext y
    simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;> intro h <;>
        (try cases h with
          | intro x hx => {
            use x
            simp_all [Function.funext_iff, Prod.ext_iff]
            <;>
            aesop
          }) <;>
        (try {
          rcases h with ⟨x, rfl⟩
          use x
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  exact h

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.exists]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h_main : range f = Ran (graph f) := by
    ext y
    simp [Set.mem_range, Graph, Function.funext_iff]
    <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;> intro h <;>
        (try
          {
            obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h
            refine' ⟨x, _⟩
            <;> simp_all
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h
            refine' ⟨x, _⟩
            <;> simp_all
          })
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        tauto
      })
  exact h_main

by
  funext y
  have h₁ : y ∈ range f ↔ ∃ (x : U), y = f x := by
    simp [Set.mem_range]
  have h₂ : y ∈ Ran (graph f) ↔ ∃ (x : U), y = f x := by
    simp [Set.mem_range, graph]
    <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try tauto) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        intro h <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {
            obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h <;>
            refine' ⟨x, _⟩ <;>
            simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
          })
      })
  rw [h₁, h₂]
  <;>
  aesop

by 
  have h : range f = Ran (graph f) := by
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_range, Function.funext_iff]
    <;>
    (try tauto) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        intro h₁ <;>
        (try
          {
            obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h₁
            refine' ⟨a, _⟩
            <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
            <;> aesop
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h₁
            refine' ⟨a, _⟩
            <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
            <;> aesop
          })
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        tauto
      })
  exact h

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_range]
  <;>
  constructor <;>
  (try intro h) <;>
  (try
    {
      rcases h with ⟨x, rfl⟩
      refine' ⟨(x, _), _⟩
      <;> simp_all [graph]
      <;> aesop
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      rcases h with ⟨⟨x, _⟩, rfl⟩
      refine' ⟨x, _⟩
      <;> simp_all [graph]
      <;> aesop
    })
  <;> aesop

by
  have h_main : range f = Ran (graph f) := by
    ext ⟨y, hy⟩
    simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_Ran]
    <;>
    (try tauto) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        rcases hy with ⟨x, rfl⟩
        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx⟩
        refine' ⟨x, _⟩
        aesop
      })
  exact h_main

by
  ext ⟨y, _⟩
  simp [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_Ran, exists_prop]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h : ∃ g : ℕ → ℕ, ∀ n, g n ≠ 3 := by
    use fun n => 0
    intro n
    norm_num
  exact h

by
  ext y
  simp [Function.range, Set.range]
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Function.graph]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Function.range, Set.range, Function.graph]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
